name: Falling Springs Center
description: Falling Springs Center is a place to play pickleball in Versailles, KY. There are 3 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. A membership is required to play.

name: Forks of Elkhorn Baptist Church
description: Forks of Elkhorn Baptist Church is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Midway, KY. There are 3 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. You can reserve the courts. A membership is required to play. Players have access to restrooms, water, and wheelchair accessibility.
